rationale: Three coordinated changes in ForwardFreedomDashboard.jsx and friends. (1) Command Center metric cards add a new TRUE CASH card backed by a new buildTrackedTrueCashMeta helper that compares current trueCash against a 30-day-old snapshot reconstructed from `snap.liquidCash - snap.creditCardDebt`, computes delta plus percent change, and selects color/arrow. The NEXT MONTH CASH FLOW card is removed and the MONTHLY CASH FLOW card is renamed to CURRENT MONTH CASH FLOW (subLabel changed from next-month plan to currentMonth plan). (2) Connection hub no longer exposes account edit/disconnect/remove: the select+edit+remove triplet that PR #22 added is removed from AccountsView.jsx along with the hubManageAccountId state, and instead TransactionsView.jsx grows Edit/Disconnect/Delete buttons next to Selected Account (with Plaid-vs-manual branching for label and action). The shared confirmation modal is extracted into new src/components/AccountRemoveConfirmModal.jsx and a new utility src/utils/accountRemovalSummary.js that contains the deleteTargetPlaidItem/LinkedAccounts/TransactionCount/SubscriptionCount computation previously inlined in AccountsView. ForwardFreedomDashboard wires `pendingManualEditAccountId` state so the Transactions 'Edit account' click navigates to ADD_ACCOUNTS and AccountsView's new useEffect deep-link consumes that id via openEditModal. (3) Planning anchor: startingMonth becomes non-configurable and pegged to live `getCurrentBudgetPeriod().month` — DashboardView.jsx and OperationsBoard.jsx both read currentBudgetPeriod.month directly, OperationsBoard's updatePlanningAnchor early-returns for any field !== 'startingTrueCash', the Starting Month <select> is removed and the descriptive copy updated to 'Projections use the current calendar month as the anchor (no backdating)'. setPlanningAnchorForYear forces startingMonth = liveStartingMonth on save, and utils/planning.js ensurePlanYearData / buildFullYearProjectionSeries both anchor to the live month. Clean reorganization matching the PR body.
